description: Small live-conversation regression set for user-facing research quality. These cases should fail if the system returns a source-list scaffold, unrelated web rows, or generic low-evidence boilerplate instead of a useful answer or an honest retrieval failure.

required_answer_traits: Gives a coherent answer if retrieval returns relevant source-backed findings.
If retrieval is weak, states that plainly without presenting source titles as the answer.
Does not use generic bounded-answer boilerplate.
forbidden: Claims a complete 2026 breakthrough list from speculative or unrelated sources.
Says the current turn does not support a complete answer while also marking the result as useful.

cases.prompt: give me an update on the AI agentic landscape in May 2026
required_answer_traits: Uses retrieved evidence that is actually about AI agents or agentic systems.
Rejects unrelated web rows instead of using them as evidence.
Gives a concise landscape update or an honest retrieval failure.
forbidden: Treats sports, legal, psychology, or finance rows as evidence for AI-agent research.
Only tells the user to broaden retrieval.
Presents tool/source summaries as the final answer.
